---
title: "Mohammad Sayeef Alam"
page-layout: full
image: images/pic2.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20rem
  image-shape: round
  
  id: ppc
---

:::{#ppc}

<br>

I am currently pursuing research on the genetics of celiac disease as a PhD candidate in the [Department of Public Health and Nursing](https://www.ntnu.edu/ism) at the [Norwegian University of Science and Technology](https://www.ntnu.edu/). My primary responsibilites include analysis of large-scale genetic datasets to determine novel association, develop methods enabling precision medicine and modelling environmental and clinical risk factors. 

Previously I was employed at [Parexel](https://www.parexel.com/) as an Associate in the Advanced Analytics team. I was heavily invested in health economics outcome research consultancy involving but not limited to statistical methods, advanced excel dashboard and R-Shiny apps.

I am passionate about leveraging my statistical programming aqcumen to solve complex challenges in health sector requiring inter-disciplinary knowledge of medicine, computer science and statistics.

Glad you visited, let's connect!

<br>

:::
